mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, version_no, version_label, content_markdown, variables_json, notes, status, is_published, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_template_version WHERE template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY version_no DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, template_id, version_no, version_label, content_markdown, variables_json, notes, status, is_published, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_template_version WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, template_id, version_no, version_label, content_markdown, variables_json, notes, status, is_published, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_template_version WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND is_published = TRUE ORDER BY version_no DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_template_version ( template_id, version_no, version_label, content_markdown, variables_json, notes, status, is_published, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{templateId}, #{versionNo}, #{versionLabel}, #{contentMarkdown}, #{variablesJson}, #{notes}, #{status}, #{isPublished}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_template_version SET version_label = #{versionLabel}, content_markdown = #{contentMarkdown}, variables_json = #{variablesJson}, notes = #{notes}, status = #{status}, is_published = #{isPublished}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_template_version SET is_published = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE template_id = #{templateId}
